SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AddressMatcher
Generic utility for grouping address records into lookup maps keyed by normalized address.
AddressMatchResult
Captures the outcome of attempting to match a single address across systems.
AddressNormalizer
Normalizes raw address strings and builds composite comparison keys.
AddressPipelineProperties
Typed configuration properties for the address pipeline.
AddressPipelineProperties.Header
Maps logical field names to the physical column header labels used in the sheet.
AddressPipelineRunner
Startup hook that triggers the address pipeline and shuts down the application cleanly.
AddressPipelineService
Orchestrates the full address pipeline that runs at application startup.
AddressQualityService
Classifies the data quality of a Salesforce address record before it enters the matching phase.
AddressQualityService.Quality
Three-tier quality classification for Salesforce address records.
AddressRecord
Base representation of an address record shared across integration systems.
AddressSyncController
REST controller for triggering the address sync pipeline on demand.
AddressSyncRequest
Request body for the address sync REST endpoint.
AddressSyncService
API-triggered address synchronization service.
AddressSyncSummary
Summary of the results returned after a sync run completes.
ApiResponse<T>
Generic wrapper for successful API responses.
AuditLogService
Structured logging service for address pipeline workflow events.
AuditService
Centralized compliance-oriented audit event logging.
BuildiumAddressRecord
Represents a single address record fetched from Buildium.
BuildiumClient
Contract for all interactions with the Buildium property management API.
BuildiumClientImpl
REST client implementation for the Buildium property management API.
BuildiumProperties
Typed configuration properties for the Buildium integration.
ErrorResponse
Structured error response returned by the API when a request fails.
GlobalExceptionHandler
Centralized exception handler for all REST controllers in this service.
GoogleSheetAddressRow
Represents one data row from the Loan Tape Google Sheet.
GoogleSheetsClient
Contract for all interactions with the Google Sheets API.
GoogleSheetsClientImpl
Google Sheets API client that reads Loan Tape rows and writes address match results.
HttpClientConfig
Spring configuration for reactive HTTP clients.
IntegrationConfig
Root Spring configuration class for the integration hub.
IntegrationHealthController
REST controller that exposes connectivity health checks for all integration vendors.
IntegrationHealthService
Aggregates connectivity health checks across all integration vendors.
IntegrationHubApplication
Entry point for the Integration Hub service.
SalesforceAddressRecord
Represents a single Salesforce Opportunity record as fetched by the address pipeline.
SalesforceClient
Contract for all interactions with the Salesforce REST API.
SalesforceClientImpl
Salesforce REST API client that authenticates via the OAuth 2.0 JWT bearer token flow.
SheetBatchUpdateRequest
Describes the cell values to write back into a single Google Sheet row.
SystemController
REST controller for application-level system endpoints.
SystemIntegrationService
Service providing system-level operations used by the general-purpose REST endpoints.
